description: Parallel combine: call two operations concurrently and join their results. Mirrors the format spec's Example 2. This fixture pins the corrected combine semantics: because each source emits exactly once, combine waits until both are ready and emits a single joined object, with no intermediate null-bearing partial.

fixtures.name: Parallel combine
fixtures.description: in fans out to customers.get and orders.list. Each emits one event. combine becomes ready when both have produced and emits exactly one combined object. Output is therefore a single event and deterministic (ordering exact).
